description: This file provides a database connection helper supporting both MySQL and PostgreSQL, with environment-based configuration, connection pooling, and query execution functions.

methods.name: getDbEngine
methods.description: Returns the configured database engine based on environment variables, defaulting to 'mysql'.

methods.name: isMysqlConfigured
methods.description: Checks if MySQL environment variables are set to indicate MySQL is configured.

methods.name: isPostgresConfigured
methods.description: Checks if PostgreSQL environment variables are set to indicate PostgreSQL is configured.

methods.name: isDbConfigured
methods.description: Determines if the currently configured database engine has environment variables set.

methods.name: dbQuery
methods.description: Executes a SQL query using the configured database engine, returning normalized results.

methods.name: dbExecRaw
methods.description: Executes raw SQL without parameters, primarily for migrations.
